message: Reorganize dashboard and activities layout
Add automated daily Strava sync with audit trail
Add personal profile page with stats, records, charts, and season history
Update handicap rule naming convention for consistency
Split all-time records into three sections with new records and visual polish
Add Kidz multiplier (2.5×), seed 2026 data with scoring engine, show engine version in tooltip
Require login to view Amendments and Audit Log pages
Add new competitor feature, change color, and dynamic login
Improve dashboard season progress bar visibility
Add Farming Competition DJ music recommendation page
Polish audit log UI and Strava sync button
Add audit log for tracking all user actions with SKETCH detection
Add change PIN modal to settings and rename Strava sync button
Fix login not showing user avatar in nav until hard refresh
Add amendment withdrawal and wait-for-all-votes resolution
Fix points tooltip being clipped at right edge of viewport
Fix active-rules tests by using in-memory test DB instead of real DB
Update README.md
Merge pull request #2 from jastone90/refactor-and-tests
Simplify manual activity form by removing duration and calories fields
Refactor shared utilities, DRY up codebase, add test coverage
Merge pull request #1 from jastone90/update-readme
Rewrite README with accurate features, scoring, and project structure
Remove PINs and user names from README, fix season dates
Add sync reminder comments between scoring-config.ts and seed.ts
Add tracked scoring config with engine versions v1.0–v1.3
Fix Strava mapper: remove unsupported activity types, fix season logic
Recover and commit scoring engine, dashboard, and test improvements
Remove seed and personal data files from git tracking
Add Strava manual sync with year-to-date import and activity type filtering
Add total elevation to leaderboard API and update dashboard
Update scoring engine: new rules, remove calorie/GP/indoor, add swimming
Remove History tab and clean up dashboard stats row
Refine dashboard standings: add Hall of Shame, Pts/Act, Miles; remove weekly stats
Add full app UI, dashboard improvements, and historical data seeding
Fix Strava mapper returning null for Walk, Hike, Rowing, Yoga, and unknown types
Add haybailz (weight lifting) scoring: 0.5 SFU per 1000 lbs
Add integration test suite and fix 4 bugs
Initial commit from Create Next App
